channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: USC's JuJu Watkins hangs 30 points on UCLA at historic Pauley Pavilion
item.description: JuJu Watkins had 30 points, five assists, three blocks and two steals for No. 4 Southern California an 80-67 victory over No. 2 UCLA.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: JuJu Watkins scores 30, No. 4 USC defeats No. 2 UCLA 80-67 to win 1st Big Ten regular-season title
item.description: JuJu Watkins scored 30 points and No. 4 Southern California defeated second-ranked UCLA 80-67 to clinch the program's first Big Ten regular-season title in its league debut.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Avalanche land Lindgren, Wild get Nyquist and Panthers acquire Seth Jones in busy day of NHL trades
item.description: Defensemen Seth Jones and Ryan Lindgren and forward Gustav Nyquist were on the move on Saturday as three Central Division teams got a jump on the NHL’s looming trade deadline.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cooper Flagg returns for 2nd half after leaving No. 2 Duke’s victory with eye injury
item.description: Duke players see star freshman Cooper Flagg’s toughness on a regular basis and that was on display for everyone else Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Bob Sutton, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Commanders acquire wide receiver Deebo Samuel in a trade with the 49ers, AP source says
item.description: The Washington Commanders have acquired wide receiver Deebo Samuel from the San Francisco 49ers for a fifth-round pick, pending a physical, according to a person with knowledge of the trade.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Man City gets past Plymouth to reach FA Cup quarters. Millwall keeper sent off for wild challenge
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The FA Cup could yet be a way for Manchester City to finish a disappointing season with a trophy.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: RSL shuts out Seattle in MLS home opener, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Having scored just one goal in its first three games of the 2025 campaign, Real Salt Lake got some help from the Seattle Sounders on its way to a 2-0 victory in its MLS home opener Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 4 Houston clinches Big 12 regular-season title with 73-64 win over Cincinnati
item.description: L.J. Cryer scored 20 points and No. 4 Houston clinched the outright Big 12 regular-season title for a second straight season with a 73-64 win over Cincinnati on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Power struggles on 44th birthday as he begins IndyCar season seeking a Penske contract extension
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Will Power had a rough 44th birthday Saturday when he lost power in his car, brushed the wall during practice and had his hybrid engine changed before qualifying for IndyCar’s season-opening race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big 12's 1st winner-take-all finale as No. 10 TCU women face No. 17 Baylor in bid for league title
item.description: WACO, Texas (AP) — There was a slight murmur from Sedona Prince's TCU teammates when the standout center mentioned growing up as a fan of Baylor, the 13-time Big 12 champion that the 10th-ranked Horned Frogs will be trying to beat for their first title in the league. “C’mon, man.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cavaliers' comeback win over Celtics give them confidence they can compete with defending champs
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — With Celtics fans in a frenzy throughout TD Garden after the Boston Celtics blitzed to a 25-3 lead over the Cavaliers in the final matchup of Eastern Conference frontrunners, Cleveland star Donovan Mitchell didn't panic. He actually was in a calm place.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 76ers shut down Joel Embiid for rest of NBA season due to nagging knee injury
item.description: The Philadelphia 76ers said it was determined that the 2023 NBA MVP was "medically unable to play." The team had attempted to manage the pain in the center's knee.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles star A.J. Brown reveals why he pursued football career over baseball
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles star wide receiver is one of the best players in the NFL, but he also played baseball in high school and was selected in the MLB Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Real Salt Lake seeks redemption in MLS home opener against Seattle Sounders
item.description: After a humbling early exit in the CONCACAF Champions Cup at the hands of Herediano, Real Salt Lake looks to hit the reset button ahead of their 2025 MLS regular season opener against the Seattle Sounders.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Pod, ABC 4

item.title: Stephen Curry scores 56 points and makes 12 3-pointers in Warriors' 121-115 win over Magic
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Stephen Curry scored a season-high 56 points, making 12 3-pointers and outscoring Orlando by himself in the third quarter of another astounding performance, leading the Golden State Warriors to a 121-115 victory over the Magic on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Girls Soccer: Bonita Vista 2, Torrey Pines 1
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- CIF Girls Open Division semifinals Bonita Vista Barons on track to repeat if with a win playing at Torrey Pines on Wednesday night. Falcons lead 1-0, but then Bonita Vista scored on a penalty kick that Ava Gavlan ripped to the net to tie the match at 1.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: GJ Girls Basketball wins opening playoff game, set for battle with #1 seed
item.description: In the first-ever playoff basketball game played at Grand Junction's brand-new gym, the Tigers came out on top.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: NFLPA Survey: Matt Eberflus rated worst head coach in 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The NFL Players Association released the results of their annual players survey Wednesday at the NFL Scouting Combine.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Wave FC to host 2025 jersey launch event at Belmont Park
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is gearing up for the launch of the team's 2025 jersey kit, with a special event slated for Thursday at Beach House, located at Belmont Park in Mission Beach.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Patriots were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz late comeback falls short against Portland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anfernee Simons had 28 points and out six assists to lead the Portland Trail Blazers to a 114-112 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Keyonte George, who scored 21 points, missed a 25-foot three-pointer at the buzzer that would have won the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
